# # FIRAS LOWF 43x43 frequency-frequency correlation matrix
# # Derived from FIRAS_COVARIANCE_MATRIX_LOWF.FITS (LAMBDA archive)
# # corr_ij = cov_ij / sqrt(cov_ii * cov_jj) from per-pixel covariance
# # 43 channels: nu_0 = 68.02 GHz, delta_nu = 13.60 GHz
# # Use with monopole 1-sigma errors from firas_monopole_spec_v1.txt (col 4)
# # to construct monopole covariance: C_ij = sigma_i * sigma_j * corr_ij
# # Reference: Fixsen et al. 1996, ApJ 473, 576
